narrative:
Woodville Twp (precinct in Sandusky County) has 941 registered voters, with 47.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.9 percentage points.
